name: ORACLE CORP
summary: Oracle Corporation provides enterprise IT products and services including cloud applications (OCA), cloud infrastructure (OCI), database software, middleware, hardware (Engineered Systems, servers, storage), and professional services. Offerings are delivered via on-premise, cloud-based, and hybrid deployment models. Customers include businesses, government agencies, and educational institutions worldwide. Oracle invested $9.9 billion in R&D in fiscal 2025 to enhance existing offerings and develop new technologies including AI integration.

products.name: Oracle Cloud Applications (OCA)
products.description: Cloud-based enterprise applications including ERP, delivered and managed by Oracle.

products.name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)
products.description: Cloud infrastructure services powering compute, data, and generative AI workloads.

products.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP
products.description: Strategic cloud ERP suite supporting accounting, supply chain, risk management, and financial planning.

products.name: Oracle Database
products.description: Enterprise database software deployable on-premise or via Oracle Cloud.

products.name: Oracle Middleware
products.description: Software layer enabling integration and interoperability across applications and infrastructure.

products.name: Oracle Engineered Systems
products.description: Integrated hardware systems including Oracle Exadata Cloud@Customer for on-premise cloud deployments.

products.name: Oracle Exadata Cloud@Customer
products.description: On-premise hardware running Oracle cloud services, used by financial institutions for banking applications.

products.name: Oracle License Support
products.description: Support contracts providing product enhancements and maintenance for license and hardware deployments.

products.name: Oracle Professional Services
products.description: Consulting and implementation services to maximize customer performance of Oracle investments.

partnerships.description: Indirect sales and distribution channel through a global network of resellers and partners.
Oracle holds an investment in Ampere; pending acquisition of Ampere by SoftBank Group Corp.
Pending acquisition of Ampere Computing Holdings LLC, in which Oracle holds an investment.
